description: Java class defining configuration properties for notifications, including settings for email, SMS, and third-party services like SendGrid, Mailjet, and Twilio.

classes.name: NotificationProperties
classes.description: Configuration properties class for notification settings, including provider configurations and contact info.

classes.name: NotificationProperties.ChannelProperties
classes.description: Inner class representing channel-specific properties such as provider and 'from' identity.

classes.name: NotificationProperties.SendGridProperties
classes.description: Inner class for SendGrid API configuration details.

classes.name: NotificationProperties.MailjetProperties
classes.description: Inner class for Mailjet API configuration details.

classes.name: NotificationProperties.TwilioProperties
classes.description: Inner class for Twilio API configuration details.

methods.name: isEnabled
methods.description: Getter for the 'enabled' flag indicating if notifications are enabled.

methods.name: setEnabled
methods.description: Setter for the 'enabled' flag.

methods.name: getEmail
methods.description: Getter for email channel properties.

methods.name: getSms
methods.description: Getter for SMS channel properties.

methods.name: getOfficerEmail
methods.description: Getter for officer email address.

methods.name: setOfficerEmail
methods.description: Setter for officer email address.

methods.name: getOfficerPhone
methods.description: Getter for officer phone number.

methods.name: setOfficerPhone
methods.description: Setter for officer phone number.

methods.name: getSendgrid
methods.description: Getter for SendGrid configuration.

methods.name: getMailjet
methods.description: Getter for Mailjet configuration.

methods.name: getTwilio
methods.description: Getter for Twilio configuration.

methods.name: getProvider
methods.description: Getter for provider key in ChannelProperties.

methods.name: setProvider
methods.description: Setter for provider key in ChannelProperties.

methods.name: getFrom
methods.description: Getter for 'from' identity in ChannelProperties.

methods.name: setFrom
methods.description: Setter for 'from' identity in ChannelProperties.

methods.name: getApiKey
methods.description: Getter for API key in SendGridProperties and MailjetProperties.

methods.name: setApiKey
methods.description: Setter for API key in SendGridProperties and MailjetProperties.

methods.name: getBaseUrl
methods.description: Getter for base URL in SendGridProperties, MailjetProperties, and TwilioProperties.

methods.name: setBaseUrl
methods.description: Setter for base URL in SendGridProperties, MailjetProperties, and TwilioProperties.

methods.name: getApiSecret
methods.description: Getter for API secret in MailjetProperties.

methods.name: setApiSecret
methods.description: Setter for API secret in MailjetProperties.

methods.name: getAccountSid
methods.description: Getter for account SID in TwilioProperties.

methods.name: setAccountSid
methods.description: Setter for account SID in TwilioProperties.

methods.name: getAuthToken
methods.description: Getter for auth token in TwilioProperties.

methods.name: setAuthToken
methods.description: Setter for auth token in TwilioProperties.
